message:
🌱 Add consul: Support HTTP connection protocol upgrades thru Envoy mission (#1198)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "consul-8283-support-http-connection-protocol-upgrades-thru-envoy",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "consul: Support HTTP connection protocol upgrades thru Envoy",
+    "description": "Support HTTP connection protocol upgrades thru Envoy. This issue affects 44+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify consul upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your consul deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul -n consul --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review consul configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant consul configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul\nkubectl get configmap -n consul -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=consul\n```\n#### Feature Description\n\nHTTP supports a [protocol upgrade mechanism](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Protocol_upgrade_mechanism) which allows upgrading existing connections to a different protocol such as WebSocket."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support HTTP connection protocol upgrades thru Envoy",
+        "description": "This should solve #8283 \n\nCredit goes to  , I simply rebased his commit on master with small changes to get CI passing to get this PR considered for merging.\n```yaml\ncurl 'http://dashboard.ingress.consul/socket.io/?EIO=3&transport=websocket' \\\n  --include \\\n  --header 'Origin: http://dashboard.ingress.consul' \\\n  --header 'Connection: keep-alive, Upgrade' \\\n  --header 'Upgrade: websocket' \\\n  --header 'Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13' \\\n  --header 'Sec-WebSocket-Key: O1b2cWbnz4bk8LyYKDiE3Q=='\n\nHTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden\ndate: Wed, 08 Jul 2020 06:29:45 GMT\nserver: envoy\nconnection: close\ncontent-length: 0\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Support HTTP connection protocol upgrades thru… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=consul -n consul --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n consul --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This should solve #8283 \n\nCredit goes to  , I simply rebased his commit on master with small changes to get CI passing to get this PR considered for merging.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "curl 'http://dashboard.ingress.consul/socket.io/?EIO=3&transport=websocket' \\\n  --include \\\n  --header 'Origin: http://dashboard.ingress.consul' \\\n  --header 'Connection: keep-alive, Upgrade' \\\n  --header 'Upgrade: websocket' \\\n  --header 'Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13' \\\n  --header 'Sec-WebSocket-Key: O1b2cWbnz4bk8LyYKDiE3Q=='\n\nHTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden\ndate: Wed, 08 Jul 2020 06:29:45 GMT\nserver: envoy\nconnection: close\ncontent-length: 0",
+        "curl 'http://dashboard.ingress.consul/socket.io/?EIO=3&transport=websocket' \\\n  --include \\\n  --header 'Origin: http://dashboard.ingress.consul' \\\n  --header 'Connection: keep-alive, Upgrade' \\\n  --header 'Upgrade: websocket' \\\n  --header 'Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13' \\\n  --header 'Sec-WebSocket-Key: O1b2cWbnz4bk8LyYKDiE3Q=='\n\nHTTP/1.1 101 Switching Protocols\nupgrade: websocket\nconnection: Upgrade\nsec-websocket-accept: f+WBHj+skiDNPZZlqh49NRVZo38=\ndate: Wed, 08 Jul 2020 07:52:15 GMT\nserver: envoy\ncontent-length: 0",
+        "#Protocol         = \"http\" # broken websocket connections - https://github.com/hashicorp/consul/issues/8283\n    Protocol         = \"tcp\""
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "consul",
+      "community",
+      "service-mesh",
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "consul"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Ingress"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "upgrade"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "community",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/hashicorp/consul/issues/8283",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/hashicorp/consul",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/hashicorp/consul/pull/9639"
+    },
+    "reactions": 44,
+    "comments": 29,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with consul installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-15T06:50:08.435Z",
